mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piijobwait (jobid, version, type, jobid_w, jobname_w) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobid_w, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobname_w, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piijobwait select jobid, cast(version as INTEGER)+1, type, jobid_w, jobname_w from cotdl.tbl_piijobwait where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
